blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain Michigan is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
